targets.expr: count by (instance, app, version, vcs_revision, vcs_time, vcs_modified, go_version, module_path) (spack_build_info{instance=~"$instance"})

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (kind, check, result, le) (rate(spack_health_check_duration_seconds_bucket{instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])))
